title: Firewall + Scheduled Tasks + Log Center
softDeps: v0.3-websites-acme (only for the website-log subview, which is deferred out of v0.5 scope)
commits: c1940db feat(v0.5): phase 1 foundation — audit interceptor + scheduler skeleton
a88e858 feat(v0.5): phase 2 scheduler — 6 runners + dogfood purge + REST
ef601e0 feat(v0.5): phase 3 firewall — ufw/firewalld drivers + 30s rollback safeguard
f1f0204 feat(v0.5): phase 4 log center + /system scaffolding + scheduler/firewall UI
9a70d83 feat(v0.5): phase 5 polish — audit retention settings + 3 e2e + 3 docs
cdb182b fix(release): rewrite workspace:* and install shared deps so npm install works on target

scope.firewall: ufw / firewall-cmd abstraction; rule CRUD; 30s apply-with-rollback safeguard; self-protect for panel + SSH ports; optional fail2ban integration
scope.scheduledTasks: in-process scheduler (node-cron); 6 task types (shell, backup files, clean logs, restart service, http request, audit-log purge); cron expression with builder UI + advanced freeform toggle; run-log per task
scope.logCenter: 5 sources (system, ssh, operation/audit, login, task); NOT website logs (deferred until v0.3, then later)

criticalDecisions: Firewall implements 30s confirm-or-rollback safeguard — without it the module is a net liability
Cron trimmed from 1Panel's 12 task types to 6; rest can be expressed via shell command
Operation/audit log table populated by every mutating REST endpoint — also serves as a security forensics tool

resolvedDecisions.auditLogRetention: 30 days default, configurable; single operation_log table + scheduler-driven daily DELETE (2026-05-18)
resolvedDecisions.logsMenuPlacement: Nested under 系統; scheduled tasks also under 系統 for symmetry (2026-05-18)
resolvedDecisions.firewallStorage: Metadata-only SQLite mirror; kernel is source of truth (2026-05-18)

verification.manualSmoke: Closed out via v0.5.1-consolidation on Rocky 9.4 (192.168.199.234) — firewall rollback, audit-log purge run-now, scheduler dogfood all green

blocks: B1: Fastify v5 has no req.routerPath — use req.routeOptions.url
B2: routes/system.tsx does not exist — /system is new construction, not refactor
B3: 30s rollback race during confirm-flight crash — added confirming_at transient column + revised boot scan
warnings: W2 per-chunk budget raised 60→120 kB (metric-chart already 107)
W3 logs viewer is virtualized div, NOT xterm reuse
W4 clean_logs path prefix allowlist hard-coded in spec
W6 @Res({passthrough:false}) endpoints are documented coverage gap
suggestions: S3 node-cron locked in, hand-rolled alternative dropped
